chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-92 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.503/2022 (U/A). 2. For orders on Office Objections at "A". 3. For hearing of M.A.No.1316/2019 (S/A). 4. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 15.03.2022 Qazi Sajid Ali Qureshi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Tufail Ahmed Kumbhar, Advocate for the respondents. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Additional Advocate General Sindh. ------ Learned counsel for the petitioner is requesting for time to supply duplicate set of the petition and to satisfy the Court on point of maintainability of the instant constitutional petition. The duplicate set of the petition to be supplied during course of day. To be fixed after four weeks for hearing on maintainability of the constitutional petition. Ju Judge Manzoor
